examples: Don't overexpose yourself to the sun without sun-cream.
It was necessary to overexpose this positive record in order to enhance the presence of the Plankton bloom.
Bolstered by an inflated sense of impulse control, we overexpose ourselves to temptation and fall prey to impulsiveness.
But she should take care not to overexpose herself--and that isn't a reference to her signature belly-baring tops.
At what point do we overexpose ourselves on social networks?
